name: Visitor
description: Was it a dream, why can you not get rid of this cursed trinket. You hoped that the Visitor was just a dream, or maybe the pact you signed was not real. Regardless, you know this trinket is the answer to your curse, and something must be done about it.

feats.name: Soul Brand
feats.description: Not sure how why you started collecting, only that you were told to. Choose a target within **far** range and mark it with your **Soul Brand**. When you kill a marked target you gain a **Soul Token**; these tokens can be used in place of **Ambition** cost. You can hold 2 at a time.
